clauses.statement: An inline Markdown destination beginning with docs/ is projected as a canonical GitHub blob URL, or a raw URL for images; VitePress destination semantics are preserved across angle wrappers, existing percent escapes, Markdown punctuation escapes, HTML entities, and spaces.

A prose docs link is normalized while VitePress block-code tokens, inline code, and parsed link destination/title regions remain unchanged; nested images in labels are handled independently, parser-rejected outer nested links remain unchanged, container and malformed fence boundaries follow the production renderer, and only top-level headings terminate release sections.
HTTP(S), anchor, mailto, site-root relative, non-docs relative, and malformed angle destinations with unescaped less-than signs or invalid Unicode remain unchanged without aborting later projection.
HTML and Vue interpolation sanitization and PR-number idempotent upsert remain intact.

test_pattern.must_contain: PCR-CON-002/003 projects a PR #350-shaped entry idempotently

clauses.statement: English and Japanese release history and CHANGELOG receive the same normalized idempotent note.

test_pattern.must_contain: PCR-CON-002/003 projects a PR #350-shaped entry idempotently

clauses.statement: Blockquote and list container headings cannot select or terminate top-level release sections.
The VitePress Markdown renderer is initialized only for project, reproject, and release-body; plan and publish-npm remain outside the parser initialization boundary.

test_pattern.must_contain: RNLN-007 initializes the Markdown renderer only for projection commands

clauses.statement: The reproject command accepts only a merged pull request for Unson-LLC/vibepro main whose canonical URL matches its positive integer PR number, updates release documentation idempotently, and never projects package or version-history state.

test_pattern.must_contain: RNLN-008 reprojects a trusted live PR payload through the real docs-only subprocess
replays merged-PR projection and immutable npm convergence

diagrams.title: Release note projection trust boundaries
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  LivePR[GitHub live merged PR payload] --> Validate[merged PR and repository validation]
  Validate --> Parse[Markdown parser and docs link normalization]
  Parse --> Sanitize[HTML and Vue sanitization]
  Sanitize --> Docs[English and Japanese release docs plus CHANGELOG]
  Unknown[Malformed or unsupported Markdown] --> Preserve[Preserve input and continue projection]
  Preserve --> Sanitize
  Reproject[Docs-only reproject command] --> Validate
  Reproject -. never invokes .-> Publish[npm publish or version history]

diagrams.title: Release note projection boundary
diagrams.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  PR[PR Release Notes] --> Normalize[docs link normalization]
  Normalize --> Escape[HTML and Vue escape once]
  Escape --> EN[English release]
  Escape --> JA[Japanese release]
  Escape --> Changelog[CHANGELOG]

diagrams.title: Markdown segment handling
diagrams.mermaid:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> ParseBlocks
  ParseBlocks --> ProtectedCode: VitePress code token
  ParseBlocks --> Prose: inline token
  Prose --> Normalized: destination starts docs/
  Prose --> Prose: other or malformed destination
  Prose --> InlineCode: code span
  InlineCode --> Prose: span closes
